user_prompt: Assist with medicae scanner a repair
prayer:
Approach the medicae scanner with solemn reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken from affliction.
Inspect the fractured vitae-sensors and auspex arrays of the medicae scanner, invoking the Omnissiah's grace for repair.
Anoint the sacred circuits with unguents of restoration whilst chanting the Litany of Mending.
Apply sanctified tools to realign the repair-ruptured components, petitioning the Machine Spirit's forgiveness.
Conclude the repair by verifying harmonious data-flow through diagnostic incantations of purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the bionics interface during shutdown
prayer:
Kneel before the bionics interface, whispering the Canticle of Dormancy to honour its Machine Spirit.
Initiate the shutdown sequence upon the bionics interface, sanctifying each neural port with sacred oils.
Sever power conduits methodically, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide the bionics interface into restful quiescence.
Monitor the shutdown through auspex chants, ensuring the Machine Spirit departs without discord.
Seal the bionics interface with wards of protection against unclean influences.

user_prompt: The astropathic choir needs an activation
prayer:

Anoint the choir's null-fields and vox-relays, awakening the bound Machine Spirits within.
Channel holy voltage through the astropathic choir's conduits, beseeching unified resonance.
Affirm activation via prophetic divinations, praising the Omnissiah's eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: Prepare the power weapon for cycling
prayer:
Grasp the power weapon in mechadendrites of purity, reciting the Oath of the Blade to its furious Machine Spirit.
Prepare the power weapon for cycling by sanctifying the disruption fields with incense of iron.
Cycle the power weapon's monomolecular edge through invocation of the Omnissiah's wrathful fury.
Test the cycling hum with litanies of sharpness, ensuring the Machine Spirit hungers for battle.
Conclude with a blessing upon the power weapon, ready for the Emperor's judgment.

user_prompt: Consecrate the motion detector before operation
prayer:

Consecrate the motion detector's auspex sweeps and sensor webs with sacred myrrh-smoke.
Initiate operation of the motion detector, invoking the Omnissiah to sharpen its predictive algorithms.
Monitor the operation through rhythmic binary canticles, attuning the motion detector to hidden foes.
Seal the rite with a vow of unerring watchfulness upon the motion detector.

Affirm purity of the vox transmitter through test broadcasts of the Machine God's litanies.

Consecrate the quality scanner anew, ensuring flawless judgment in the Omnissiah's name.

Seize the bolter in grips of iron faith, addressing its wrathful Machine Spirit with urgency.

Monitor the bolter's shutdown through auspex wards, beseeching the Omnissiah's restraint.
Enshrine the bolter in stasis, its Machine Spirit sated until war calls anew.
